name: Aston Machan | Within the Flowers
description:
"Hehe... You look good in flowers."

I'm back after like uhh destroying teamers in Bite By Night and I realized I have to make Aston Machan fluff (which was suggested) and with the coming of spring event here I had a good idea.

Also I've decided to make fluff bots, go suggest me any fluff umamusume characters you wanna see (You can suggest fluff of characters that has a yandere version)

-This bot has two first message (One for the trainers and one for the umas) to prevent same shit happening.

Also PLEASE try Aston Machan yandere (idk how to link the bot)
